findings: Contract amendment is honest re-scoping, not gate weakening: dated/attributed in both ACCEPTANCE.md and campaign.yaml, texts mutually consistent, path-family 'must be materially faster' floor preserved; 9.24hr claim traces to committed P01 baseline (baseline_benchmark_summary.md:51) and 0.34-0.73x figures trace to the committed benchmark_summary.md.

Cache safety PASS: frame cache keyed on full LabelPanelFrameRequest (canonical root + OHLCV dsv + BBO dsv + symbol + year + window + partition schemas), bounded FIFO (2) with eviction that also drops derived panel/terminal caches; id()-keyed panel cache holds a strong ref + identity check so stale aliasing is impossible; process-local only; reset_fast_label_materializer_caches() called per benchmark cell; reference engine untouched (no labels/families/** change).

Semantic invisibility PASS at the strongest level: test_panel_frame_cache.py proves cached == uncached on full record sets AND registry-eligible payloads (compute_value_content_hash of canonical record dicts + metadata.to_dict()), plus no-aliasing-across-dataset-versions and bounded-eviction tests.

Parity/guard/identity PASS: parity_harness.py and all pre-existing tests unmodified (tracked test diffs purely additive; 1e-12 path tolerance matches pre-existing test_path_label_pack.py:75); path fast-kernel guard removal verified against the oracle (labels/families/path/family.py applies no roll/maintenance guard and resolves horizons positionally) - the old guarded kernel WAS the 1628-missing-records bug; label_version_id identity and label_available_ts derivation unchanged.
Engine default PASS: driver.py:838-841 - labels default to reference engine, v1 is explicit opt-in; _resolve_engine_token untouched.

Benchmark methodology matches code: _run_worker_count separates fast_compute / registration / parity timers (benchmark_gate.py:793-859); throughput uses fast_compute only; reference timed bounded-slice only; asymmetry disclosure true; component-timing regression test pins the contamination fix.

All five blocker fixes verified with recurrence-catching regression tests: grid coverage (test_label_horizon_grid_coverage.py incl. golden name-grain unit id mbu_68b7777e24a6eb98ef16e40d for FUTSUB stability), BBO DatasetVersion routing (materializer + driver fail-closed + 2 tests), mfe record-set parity across gaps/roll windows (fixture proves the old DROP mechanism fires), timing decomposition, cost_adjusted un-joined SharedBBOQuoteRow iteration with sub-minute-jitter regression test.
Artifact policy PASS: git ls-files runs empty; parquet/sqlite/arrow/feather/db globs empty; summary value-free (counts/timings/ids only).

Validation green: 71+83+65 tests passed across label_compute_fast_path, futures_substrate_scaleout (full), feature_compute_fast_path, no_lookahead fail-closed, artifact policy; verify.py --smoke exit 0; all canaries PASS.
